title: 多 Agent 研究系统架构：协调者与专家分工

body.overview: Anthropic 的 Research 功能采用「主导者-工作者」模式：一个主 Agent 负责规划和协调，多个子 Agent 并行探索不同方向，最后由 CitationAgent 处理引用。

components.name: LeadResearcher（主研究员）
components.role: 分析用户问题，制定策略，分配任务给子 Agent，综合所有结果，判断是否需要继续搜索

components.name: Subagent（子 Agent）
components.role: 接收具体任务，独立执行网页搜索，通过 interleaved thinking 评估结果，将发现汇报给主研究员

components.name: CitationAgent（引用处理员）
components.role: 在研究完成后，处理所有文档，为每条结论标注具体来源位置

body.flow: 1. 用户提交问题 → 2. LeadResearcher 思考策略并将计划写入 Memory（防止超出 200K token 上下文被截断）→ 3. 生成若干个带明确任务的子 Agent → 4. 子 Agent 并行搜索 → 5. LeadResearcher 综合结果，决定是否继续 → 6. 退出研究循环 → 7. CitationAgent 添加引用 → 8. 返回最终报告

body_en.overview: Anthropic's Research feature uses an orchestrator-worker pattern: a lead agent plans and coordinates, parallel subagents explore different directions simultaneously, and a CitationAgent handles source attribution at the end.

components.name: LeadResearcher
components.role: Analyzes the query, develops strategy, assigns tasks to subagents, synthesizes results, decides whether more research is needed

components.name: Subagent
components.role: Receives a specific task, independently runs web searches, evaluates results with interleaved thinking, reports findings back to the lead

components.name: CitationAgent
components.role: After research is complete, processes all documents to identify exact source locations for every claim

body_en.flow: 1. User submits query → 2. LeadResearcher plans strategy, saves plan to Memory (context can exceed 200K tokens and get truncated) → 3. Spawns subagents with specific tasks → 4. Subagents search in parallel → 5. LeadResearcher synthesizes, decides if more research needed → 6. Exit research loop → 7. CitationAgent adds citations → 8. Return final report
